languages.text: "Что бы вы обо мне ни думали, я не пошлю человека на убой ради веселья".
"Whatever you may think of me, I won't send someone to be butchered just for a laugh."
languages.original_text: "Что бы вы обо мне ни думали, я не пошлю человека на убой ради веселья".

traits.locale_text: "Whatever you may think of me, I won't send a man to be butchered just for a laugh."
"Whatever you may think of me, I won't send someone to be butchered just for a laugh."
"I don't think it'll make a difference. But what kind of person would I be if I didn't even offer advice?"
"Whatever you may think of me, I won't send a man to be butchered just for a laugh."
"Whatever you may think of me, I won't send someone to be butchered just for a laugh."
"Whatever you may think of me, I won't send someone to be butchered just for a laugh."

languages.text: 「きっと変わらないと思う。でも、アドバイスも言わないでいたら、私はどんな人間になるんだろう」
languages.original_text: "I don't think it'll make a difference. But what kind of person would I be if I didn't even offer advice?"

traits.locale_text: 「きっと変わらないと思う。でも、アドバイスも言わないでいたら、私はどんな人間になるんだろう」

languages.text: « Quoi que vous pensiez de moi, je n'enverrais pas quelqu'un à l'abattoir pour le seul plaisir de me divertir. »
languages.original_text: "Whatever you may think of me, I won't send someone to be butchered just for a laugh."

traits.locale_text: « Quoi que vous pensiez de moi, je n'enverrais pas quelqu'un à l'abattoir pour le seul plaisir de me divertir. »

languages.text: "Benim hakkımda ne düşünürsen düşün, birini keyfi olarak katledilmeye göndermem."
languages.original_text: "Whatever you may think of me, I won't send someone to be butchered just for a laugh."

traits.locale_text: "Benim hakkımda ne düşünürsen düşün, birini keyfi olarak katledilmeye göndermem."

languages.text: «Piense lo que quiera de mí, pero no tengo por costumbre mandar a mis hombres a una masacre solo para echarme unas risas».
languages.original_text: "Whatever you may think of me, I won't send someone to be butchered just for a laugh."

traits.locale_text: «Piense lo que quiera de mí, pero no tengo por costumbre mandar a mis hombres a una masacre solo para echarme unas risas».

languages.text: “不管您怎么看我，我可不会为了取乐就派人去送死。”
languages.original_text: "Whatever you may think of me, I won't send someone to be butchered just for a laugh."

traits.locale_text: “不管您怎么看我，我可不会为了取乐就派人去送死。”

languages.text: "Was auch immer Ihr von mir denkt, ich schicken niemanden zum Spaß auf die Schlachtbank."
languages.original_text: "Whatever you may think of me, I won't send someone to be butchered just for a laugh."

traits.locale_text: "Was auch immer Ihr von mir denkt, ich schicken niemanden zum Spaß auf die Schlachtbank."
